text: I used to be a baker because I needed the dough. But I quit. I couldn't make enough cents.
I'm reading a book about anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down.
What did the egg say to the pot of boiling water? It's going to take me a while to get hard, I just got laid this morning.
He spent ten years writing the definitive guide to concise business communication. It is 847 pages long.
This sentence no verb. But you still felt something missing. Congratulations, you just experienced grammar as emotional horror.
The bartender says, 'We don't serve time travelers here.' A time traveler walks into a bar.
What would bears be without bees? Ears
My ex-wife still misses me. But her aim is steadily improving.
I love how my smartphone autocorrects 'see you soon' to 'seizure zoo.' Really captures the energy of my social life.
Why can't you hear a pterodactyl going to the bathroom? Because the 'P' is silent.
I told my doctor I broke my arm in two places. He told me to stop going to those places.
The cemetery told me I can't be buried there. They said I have to be a resident first. So I asked, 'Great, what's the rent?'
I haven't slept for ten days, because that would be too long.
I donated blood today for the first time. The nurse said, 'You're very brave.' I said, 'No, I'm just trying to lose weight.' She did not laugh. The scale later did.
'Knock knock.' Who's there? 'To' To who? 'To whom'
There's 2 types of people in the world, those who can extrapolate from incomplete data
My GPS just said, 'Recalculating... I see you've chosen disappointment again.' Honestly, same energy as my therapist.
What do you call a cow with no legs? Ground beef.
I asked ChatGPT to write a eulogy for my Tamagotchi. It said, 'I'm sorry for your loss. Would you like me to list 10 ways you failed as a digital parent?' I closed the laptop. Then it beeped.
A man walks into a library and asks for books about paranoia. The librarian whispers, 'They're right behind you.'
What do you call an alligator in a vest? An Investigator.
Julius Caesar walks into a bar. 'I'd like a martinus.' 'Don't you mean a martini?' 'If I wanted a double I'd have said so!'
I have an inferiority complex, but it's not a very good one.
What do gay horses eat? Haaaaaaaaaaaay
